# Elfurat Spices
Elfurat Spices is a global exporter of premium Indian spices, aromatics, dry fruits, and pantry staples.

## Products
- Indian Spices: Cumin, Coriander, Turmeric, Red Chilli, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Cloves, Cinnamon.
- Aromatics: Saffron, Vanilla.
- Dry Fruits: Cashews, Almonds, Pistachios, Raisins.
- Pantry Staples: Rice, Pulses, Sugar, Salt.

## Contact
Website: https://elfuratspices.com
Export Inquiries: https://elfuratspices.com/export-inquiries
